debug_info.goal:
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut : Type
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
i : Fin (n + 1)
stmt : StmtIn
wit : WitIn
prover : Prover oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut pSpec
⊢ Prod.fst <$>
      ((simulateQ loggingOracle).toFun (Transcript i pSpec × prover.PrvState i)
          (Fin.induction (pure (default, prover.input (stmt, wit)))
            (fun j => @Prover.processRound ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut n pSpec j prover) i)).run =
    Fin.induction (pure (default, prover.input (stmt, wit)))
      (fun j => @Prover.processRound ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut n pSpec j prover) i
